title: Plan for B2 Bridge
subtitle: From familiar topics to abstract ideas.
overview: From familiar topics to abstract ideas.
Module: Integrated Output. B1 Core develops balanced English: stronger stories, clearer opinions, practical writing, conversation repair, native-style input, and confident spoken output.

sections.title: B1 core focus
rows: B2 Bridge will ask you to handle more abstract ideas, longer input, and more nuanced output.
B2 Bridge 会要求你处理更抽象的想法、更长的输入和更细腻的输出。
Useful frame: prepare, speak or write, review, and reuse the best sentence.
实用框架：准备、说或写、复盘，并重复使用最好的句子。
Make a plan for moving from B1 Core to B2 Bridge.
制定从 B1 Core 进入 B2 Bridge 的计划。
To prepare for B2 Bridge, I need to practice longer opinions, more natural listening, and clearer examples from real life. I also need to speak with less translation in my head.
为了准备 B2 Bridge，我需要练习更长的观点、更自然的听力，以及来自真实生活的更清楚例子。我也需要减少脑中翻译后再说。

items.en: B2 Bridge will ask you to handle more abstract ideas, longer input, and more nuanced output.
items.zh: B2 Bridge 会要求你处理更抽象的想法、更长的输入和更细腻的输出。

items.en: Useful frame: prepare, speak or write, review, and reuse the best sentence.
items.zh: 实用框架：准备、说或写、复盘，并重复使用最好的句子。

items.en: To prepare for B2 Bridge, I need to practice longer opinions, more natural listening, and clearer examples from real life. I also need to speak with less translation in my head.
items.zh: 为了准备 B2 Bridge，我需要练习更长的观点、更自然的听力，以及来自真实生活的更清楚例子。我也需要减少脑中翻译后再说。

items.en: I can say this slowly first, then again with a more natural rhythm.
items.zh: 我可以先慢速说这句，然后再用更自然的节奏说一遍。

items.en: The goal is not a perfect sentence; the goal is a useful sentence I can actually say.
items.zh: 目标不是完美句子；目标是我真的能说出来的有用句子。

items.en: I will keep the main idea clear and add only the details that help.
items.zh: 我会保持主要意思清楚，只加入有帮助的细节。

items.en: If I get stuck, I can repair the sentence and continue.
items.zh: 如果我卡住了，我可以修正句子并继续说。

items.en: This lesson should become part of my spoken English, not just something I understand.
items.zh: 这节课应该变成我口语的一部分，而不只是我理解的内容。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Make a plan for moving from B1 Core to B2 Bridge.
lines.zh: 制定从 B1 Core 进入 B2 Bridge 的计划。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: To prepare for B2 Bridge, I need to practice longer opinions, more natural listening, and clearer examples from real life. I also need to speak with less translation in my head.
lines.zh: 为了准备 B2 Bridge，我需要练习更长的观点、更自然的听力，以及来自真实生活的更清楚例子。我也需要减少脑中翻译后再说。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can you say the same idea more simply?
lines.zh: 你能把同一个意思说得更简单吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Yes. I will keep the key idea, one reason, and one example.
lines.zh: 可以。我会保留核心意思、一个原因和一个例子。

items.en: Make a plan for moving from B1 Core to B2 Bridge.
items.zh: 制定从 B1 Core 进入 B2 Bridge 的计划。

items.en: Make one version about your real life.
items.zh: 做一个关于你真实生活的版本。

items.en: Record it once slowly and once at normal speed.
items.zh: 慢速录一遍，再用正常速度录一遍。

items.en: Listen again and improve one thing: clarity, rhythm, or detail.
items.zh: 再听一遍，并改进一个方面：清晰度、节奏或细节。

items.en: Use the best sentence again tomorrow so it becomes automatic.
items.zh: 明天再次使用最好的句子，让它变得自动化。
